name: mapscraper-pro
description: **Google Maps Data Extraction Platform** — A production-ready Mini SaaS that scrapes business data from Google Maps at scale.

scripts.dev: concurrently --kill-others-on-fail --prefix-colors "bgBlue.bold,bgGreen.bold,bgMagenta.bold" --names "BACKEND ,FRONTEND,SCRAPER " "npm run dev --prefix backend" "npm run dev --prefix frontend" "uvicorn main:app --host 0.0.0.0 --port 8000 --reload --app-dir scraper"
scripts.install:all: npm install && npm install --prefix backend && npm install --prefix frontend
